title: University Research Initiatives
description: The University Research Initiative (URI) seeks to improve the quality of defense research conducted by universities and supports the education of engineers and scientists in disciplines critical to national defense needs. The initiative is a collection of three specialized research programs performed by academic research institutions.
text:
The University Research Initiative seeks to improve the quality of defense research conducted by universities and supports the education of engineers and scientists in disciplines critical to national defense needs. The initiative is a collection of specialized research programs performed by academic research institutions.
Defense University Research Instrumentation Program (DURIP)
Multidisciplinary Research Program of the University Research Initiatives (MURI)
The Presidential Early Career Award for Scientists and Engineers (PECASE) Program
